title: AXConnectedPosition
description: Interface defining the positioning configuration for connected elements with precise control over origin and overlay alignment.

props.name: originX
props.description: Horizontal alignment of the origin element (the element being positioned relative to).

props.name: originY
props.description: Vertical alignment of the origin element (the element being positioned relative to).

props.name: overlayX
props.description: Horizontal alignment of the overlay element (the element being positioned).

props.name: overlayY
props.description: Vertical alignment of the overlay element (the element being positioned).

props.name: weight
props.description: Optional weight for position priority when multiple positions are available.

props.name: offsetX
props.description: Optional horizontal offset in pixels from the calculated position.

props.name: offsetY
props.description: Optional vertical offset in pixels from the calculated position.

sections.title: Interface Definition
sections.description: TypeScript definition of the connected position interface.
